name: SUBUNGUAL EXOSTOSIS
definition: DUPUYTREN EXOSTOSIS uncommon solitary benign bone lesion arising from distal phalanx beneath the nail producing

demographics.Histo: inflammatory growth of proliferating fibroblasts and cartilage undergoing enchondral
demographics.Location: toes (86-90%, big toe in 77-80%), thumb + index finger (10-14%, dominant hand in

dominant_finding: subungual exostosis hypointense on all sequences
distribution: toes (86-90%, big toe in 77-80%), thumb + index finger (10-14%, dominant hand in
discriminating_features: broad sessile / narrow pedunculated base of bone spur
indistinct / well-demarcated cartilage cap larger than base
NO continuity to cortex / medulla of host bone (DDx to osteochondroma)
ossific mass with trabecular bony overgrowth distal to physeal scar: ± defined cortex

general: broad sessile / narrow pedunculated base of bone spur
indistinct / well-demarcated cartilage cap larger than base
